name: TextVerticalAlignment
summary: Vertical location of text attach point relative to text

enum_values.name: Top
enum_values.summary: Attach to top of an "I" on the first line. (Independent of glyphs being displayed.)

enum_values.name: MiddleOfTop
enum_values.summary: Attach to middle of an "I" on the first line. (Independent of glyphs being displayed.)

enum_values.name: BottomOfTop
enum_values.summary: Attach to baseline of first line. (Independent of glyphs being displayed.)

enum_values.name: Middle
enum_values.summary: Attach to middle of text vertical advance. (Independent of glyphs being displayed.)

enum_values.name: MiddleOfBottom
enum_values.summary: Attach to middle of an "I" on the last line. (Independent of glyphs being displayed.)

enum_values.name: Bottom
enum_values.summary: Attach to the baseline of the last line. (Independent of glyphs being displayed.)

enum_values.name: BottomOfBoundingBox
enum_values.summary: Attach to the bottom of the boudning box of the visible glyphs.
